title: Local authorities planning calendar 2024 to 2025
body: "  The Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA) closed on 31 March 2025. All activity has moved to the Department for Education (DfE). You should continue to follow this guidance.   The local authority planning calendar provides a summary of important dates for Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA) activities in the 2024 to 2025 financial year (covering the period of January 2025 to March 2025), that relate to local authority funding, finance and compliance with funding regulations.  The calendar is for planning purposes only and dates are provisional and subject to change.  "

taxons.title: Local authority schools financial reporting and assurance
